codeReview.summary: Feature was already implemented before this worker session. Worker correctly identified pre-existence and verified implementation. All CRUD operations (store/get/update/delete), search(), and type/label filtering are implemented in SqliteMemoryStore. Tests pass. Implementation is solid.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature specified skill 'rust-worker' which does not exist. AGENTS.md lists 'rust' skill (not 'rust-worker'). Worker correctly recognized skill doesn't exist and adapted. This is a documentation mismatch - features.json should use 'rust' not 'rust-worker'.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json skillName='rust-worker' vs AGENTS.md skill table showing 'rust' skill. Transcript shows: Skill "rust-worker" not found

sharedStateObservations.observation: CommitId in handoff (9229e2f) does not correspond to memory-sqlite-store implementation. Commit 9229e2f is 'feat(validation): user-testing synthesis for state milestone'. This suggests the memory-sqlite-store feature was implemented in an earlier commit that was not recorded in the handoff.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git show 9229e2f --stat shows validation/state/user-testing/synthesis.json changed, not any memory code. handoff.commitId='9229e2f'.

summary: Feature memory-sqlite-store passes review. Implementation already existed prior to this worker session. Worker properly verified existing code: build succeeds, all 5 tests pass (test_store_and_get, test_update_and_delete, test_search, test_get_by_type, test_get_by_label), clippy clean. Implementation covers all required behaviors: CRUD operations, search() with query/block_types/labels filtering, get_by_type/get_by_label with repository scoping. Minor shared state gap: features.json references non-existent 'rust-worker' skill instead of 'rust'.
